payload.answer: Committed durable architecture memories and preserved the open questions as unresolved.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes architectural preferences and open questions without requiring resolution to an existing entity.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth in the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Accepted Brain DB as the intended source of truth.
Accepted Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Accepted Slack as a strict memory intake agent.
Recorded Telegram integration and model selection as open questions rather than decisions.
